title: Image 'VulnerableWin.exe' does not have the ASLR flag set in the PE header — CWE-693 Protection Mechanism Failure.
evidence: Image 'VulnerableWin.exe' does not have the ASLR flag set in the PE header — CWE-693 Protection Mechanism Failure.

title: Image 'VulnerableWin.exe' does not have Control Flow Guard enabled.
evidence: Image 'VulnerableWin.exe' does not have Control Flow Guard enabled.

title: Image 'VulnerableWin.exe' has stack protection but some functions are marked /GS-.
evidence: Image 'VulnerableWin.exe' has stack protection but some functions are marked /GS-.
fix_recipe: Remove /GS- from any function not explicitly requiring it.

title: PE binary is unsigned
fix_recipe: Sign with SignTool /fd sha256 /tr http://timestamp.digicert.com /td sha256 /a VulnerableWin.exe
